title: Scanner Normalizers — GCP SCC Real Client & Mock Fallback Parity
description: test_scanner_parsers_coverage.py and test_scanner_parsers_unit.py have TestGCPSecurityClientMockFallback — the GCP Security Command Center client falls back to mock data when unconfigured. The 32 scanner normalizers in scanner_parsers.py parse findings from external tools but do not validate that mock and real API responses have the same schema, causing silent drift between mock and production.
missing: Schema parity validation: add a test that compares mock_finding keys against a recorded real API response fixture for each of the 32 normalizers
GCP SCC real client: implement google-cloud-securitycenter SDK integration with org-level finding pagination and source filtering
Scanner result deduplication: add fingerprint-based dedup across all 32 parsers so the same CVE from multiple scanners merges into one finding
